title: Arkangel AI <> AIH - Growth Proposal Presentation
summary: Formal proposal presentation to Arkangel AI following initial validation. Arkangel currently generates 55K organic visits in 37 days with a database of 100K doctors. The proposed growth target is 2.53x in 6 months to reach $4.5M in revenue. A hybrid commercial model was presented: $3,170/month retainer plus 3% revenue share (waived for the first 3 months), structured in three phases — Foundation ($8K setup), Acceleration ($2.5K/month), and Optimization. The client showed strong interest, and a dry run is scheduled to validate key growth hypotheses before a final decision.

discussion_points.description: Proposed pricing structure combining a $3,170/month retainer with 3% revenue share. Revenue share is waived for the first 3 months as a trial period. Payment terms set at 45 days upon client collection. Minimum 6-month contract with total retainer of $19,020.

Arkangel AI has 55,000 organic visits in 37 days and a database of 100,000 doctors. The growth target is 2.53x in 6 months to reach $4.5M in revenue. Currently losing $167K/month in pipeline without a proper system in place.

Phase 1 (Foundation): $8K setup including middle-tier offers, attribution system, and KOL structure. Phase 2 (Acceleration): $2.5K/month with monthly playbook deliveries. Phase 3 (Optimization): Fine-tuning for maximum growth.

Laura has already made significant internal advances including a CRM system, SOUL files, and a Content Engine called 'Claudio'. Phase 1 is partially completed internally, which accelerates the engagement timeline.
Need to implement a system to track and attribute revenue to marketing efforts. Without this system, the estimated pipeline loss is $167K/month.
Plan to structure a Key Opinion Leaders (KOL) program to leverage the medical professional network for organic growth and credibility.

action_items.description: Organize dry run to validate key growth hypotheses
Accompany team in system installation and setup

decisions: Hybrid pricing model adopted: $3,170/month retainer + 3% revenue share
Revenue share waived for the first 3 months (trial period)
Payment terms set at 45 days upon client collection
Three-phase implementation plan: Foundation ($8K), Acceleration ($2.5K/month), Optimization
Dry run scheduled for the following day to validate growth hypotheses
next_steps: Conduct dry run tomorrow (Feb 18) to validate growth hypotheses
Daniel to accompany the team in system and playbook installation
Begin monthly playbook deliveries for marketing
Await final decision from Laura Velásquez Herrera (CEO) after dry run validation
